name: AIOS — SMS Conversation Enrichment (WF8)
description: Async enrichment of SMS conversations. Fetches tenant profile, composes Claude system prompt from profile + conversation, calls Anthropic direct via HTTP, reports summary event to AIOS. Canonical 5-node pattern: profile -> prompt -> Claude -> act -> event.
